description: Lightweight static analysis for many languages. Find bug variants with patterns that look like source code.

commit_message:
Add Kiro MCP integration documentation (semgrep/semgrep-proprietary#6453)

## Description

This PR adds documentation for integrating Semgrep with Kiro, a new AI
code editor by Amazon. The documentation follows the same pattern as
existing integrations (Cursor, VS Code/Copilot, Windsurf) and includes:

- Quick-add buttons for both local (stdio) onfigurations
- Configuration examples for `.kiro/settings/mcp.json`
- Links to Kiro's MCP documentation

## Test plan

N/A - Documentation only change
